[ music ] i don ' t know if i was early or you were late or this just stops way better. i mean, were you happy with your run? > > yeah, definitely. i think that ' s just technology and also my foot then went nearly to the floor and it smells very very hot. > > just go for a little drive to cool them down. i think we can see the gap. the gap is large. > > yeah, you ' ve definitely win that one. that ' s for certain. well, thanks for coming down and playing with your amazing new hypercar. i really like it. it ' s got the performance. it ' s still mental quick. even today, i ' m very, very jealous. > > no, thank you so much. and like, yeah, i like every single day it just gets a little bit more exciting. and there ' s that many buttons and like gizmos on it. it ' s not just you don ' t just get in, drive it. there ' s all sorts of stuff you can play with. but lots of fun. > > lovely. now, if you want to compare these cars / quart mile times to everything else we ' ve ever drag raced, then just click on the car wow logo. if you want to watch some other videos, you just click on the video windows. thanks for watching and i ' ll see you next time. and a huge thanks to the chap who lent me this. huge thank you. lovely car.
